title: Enhanced Tooltips
description: This makes tooltips look more golden with a red background.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07716cf41a4b95b09bb3338ec2fdf0b57973e8d8.png)
# This Changed All Minecraft Tool Tips into a golden and red tool tip.
There will be more tool tips coming very soon but right now there will just be this one design. 

## What Version does this support
This Has to run in **snapshot 24w36a** or later, or the full **release 1.21.2** because of the changes recently made with the tool tips.

These are the tooltips shown below
![bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ee209bfe10e81774ef3ca885cc5a9e8853c443a.png)
![End Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cfe6c121e79c81156cfb068ca5ef8d2f7758cb2.png)
![Bee Hive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95aaaaec804ad639db9ed0c4783579baba0837fe.png)
